item.title: Delegated action rules — blueprint-level pre-approved action categories with pattern matching
item.intent: Users must define what their agent can do without asking. Email delegation is the first use case but the pattern generalizes.
item.description: Clawdius recon (2026-03-29): delegated-send-rules.json defines pre-approved categories. ClawHQ has no action-level delegation config.
steps: Create src/design/blueprints/delegation-types.ts with DelegationRule, DelegationCategory, DelegatedActionRules interfaces
Create src/design/blueprints/delegation-defaults.ts with email delegation defaults (appointment-confirm, vendor-reply, unsubscribe)
Add delegation_rules optional section to BlueprintSchema in src/design/blueprints/types.ts
Update generate.ts to compile delegation rules into workspace/delegated-rules.json

acceptanceCriteria.text: Blueprints can define delegated action rules per tool
Email-manager ships with email delegation defaults
